description_long: This is a modern, rectangular storage cabinet with a clean, minimalist design. The cabinet features a white exterior with natural wood accents on the legs, handles, and the front panels of the doors and drawer. The front side includes two large doors on either end, a central open shelf, and a single drawer beneath the shelf, all with matching wood handles. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for placing decorative items or electronics. The legs are short and slightly angled, giving the cabinet a mid-century modern aesthetic. The overall construction appears to be primarily wood or engineered wood, with a smooth, matte finish.
description: A modern white cabinet with wood accents, featuring two doors, a central drawer, and an open shelf. It has a flat top and short, angled wooden legs.
description_view_0: The back view shows a plain, flat white panel with no visible features or openings, and the wooden legs are visible at the corners.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a solid white side panel and two wooden legs, with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_2: The front view reveals two wood-accented doors, a central open shelf, a drawer, and matching wood handles, highlighting the cabinet's main interactive features.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a plain white side panel and two wooden legs.
